curmudgeon_rubric: N/A — no code patch to review. Curmudgeon may skim the finding for factual accuracy if desired, but there is nothing actionable to assess against the design rubric.
integration_gate: Per HNOTE-OPERATOR-PHASE-B-DRAIN-PRIORITY-003 and HNOTE-001 itself: no operator approval gate. Decider may close §B2 directly.
finding_headline: Phase B2's target file (build-scripts/build-doc-v4.js) was deleted in commit 438b1f7 on 2026-04-07, 17 days before HNOTE-001 was authored. The DOCX export pipeline no longer exists; the current PDF pipeline (Playwright headless Chromium loading docs/index.html) inherits the HTML font stack automatically. Typographic parity between screen and export is already structurally guaranteed. §B2 has no work to do as commissioned.
why_this_is_a_finding_not_a_patch: The HNOTE explicitly delegates scope-question authority to the analyst: 'Flag any scope questions back via a new analyst issue-proposal; do not block on waiting.' Restoring an 898-line generator and two npm dependencies that were deliberately deleted in a named architecture migration (V5.0) is not 'Phase B polish' — it is a reversal of an architectural decision that was committed under signed authorship. Reviving that pipeline (if desired) is a separate-HNOTE-sized commission, not §B2.

hnote_status_recommendation.note: HNOTE-PHASE-B-DESIGN-REFRESH-COMMISSION-001 commissioned three EXPs (B1, B2, B3). B1 (EXP-249) is delivered. B2 (EXP-250) is delivered as a scope-obsolete finding. B3 (next slot) is still pending. Update consumed_progress.B2 to status='scope_obsolete' and leave the HNOTE 'pending' until B3 ships.

B2 (DOCX typography alignment).delivery_note: Target file build-scripts/build-doc-v4.js was deleted in commit 438b1f7 (2026-04-07), 17 days before HNOTE was authored. Current PDF pipeline (Playwright via build-scripts/generate-pdf.js) inherits HTML font stack automatically; typographic parity already achieved by architecture. No code change. See findings_file for full evidence.

summary: EXP-250 documents a scope mismatch between HNOTE-PHASE-B-DESIGN-REFRESH-COMMISSION-001 §B2 and current repo state. §B2 commissions an update to build-scripts/build-doc-v4.js, but that file was deleted in commit 438b1f7 (2026-04-07T17:18:18+01:00) along with build-doc-v2.js, build-doc-v3.js, the adm-zip and docx npm dependencies, and the legacy DOCX/PDF artifacts under downloads/. The deletion was deliberate cleanup after the V5.0 migration to an HTML→Playwright→PDF pipeline. README.md, SESSION-CONTEXT.md, and generate-pdf.js's own header comment all explicitly acknowledge the removal. The HNOTE was authored 2026-04-24, 17 days later, apparently from stale context. Current PDF generation uses Playwright headless Chromium loading docs/index.html via file://, which inherits the @font-face block at generate-html.js:495 (Source Serif 4 / Inter / JetBrains Mono, all self-hosted under docs/fonts/) automatically. Typographic parity HTML↔PDF is structurally guaranteed. There is no DOCX target to align; §B2 has no work to do. Recommendation: close §B2 obsolete, leave HNOTE-001 pending for B3, file a separate HNOTE if DOCX revival is genuinely wanted.
what_decider_should_do: Close EXP-250 in expansion-tracker.json as status='complete', integrated=true (the integration is just acknowledging the finding; no patch).
Update HNOTE-001's consumed_progress.B2 to status='scope_obsolete' per the suggested_progress_field above.

Do NOT queue this for curmudgeon (no patch to review). Optional: if DIRECTIVE-003 mandates curmudgeon review of every Phase B EXP, queue with a one-line rubric note ('finding-only EXP, factual review only, no design rubric applies').
Do NOT re-assign §B2 to anyone. The finding is the deliverable.

On the next analyst Mode 2 run, the priority order from HNOTE-OPERATOR-PHASE-B-DRAIN-PRIORITY-003 stays unchanged: HNOTE-001 §B3 is the next item (now logically next, since §B2 is closed). HNOTE-002 (verdict-chip click-through) follows.
If the operator does want DOCX export back, a fresh HNOTE is the right vehicle — not a re-open of §B2.
what_decider_should_NOT_do: Do not 'restore' build-doc-v4.js from history — that reverses a named-version architectural decision and should require an explicit operator HNOTE.

Do not edit the FUSE-orphan build-doc-v4.js that survives in the workspace mount — it is not under git tracking and the change would not propagate to git or the published site. The orphan is a trap, not a target.
Do not add adm-zip or docx back to package.json — those were deliberately removed in 438b1f7 for the V5.0 cleanup.

scope_creep_flag.creep_risk: If anyone reads §B2 as 'and add OTF/TTF font variants to docs/fonts/' independent of the DOCX context, that is a Tier-2 mission creep — the OTF/TTF variants were specifically requested for Word/DOCX consumption. With no DOCX consumer, they have no purpose. Adding font files we do not consume is dead-code in the asset directory.
scope_creep_flag.answer: Do not add OTF/TTF variants. Existing variable WOFF2 + per-weight WOFF2 fully covers the HTML+PDF pipeline.
